title: Moren's 3D Swords
description: A resource pack that makes the Swords more 3D.
body:
**As you can see:**
![banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18ea4b11cb9ec23e3cb784d216f633d84bf21b15_0.webp)

This is an ultra-lightweight vanilla-style 3D Swords resource pack. It requires no OptiFine or mods and supports Program Art.

It makes swords less flat in appearance, balancing their dimensions when held and placed in item frames to achieve more natural proportions. In vanilla Minecraft, all items share a fixed size limit. Their minimum size is determined by PNG textures, and swords follow identical holding rules as other items.

This pack remodels swords and adjusts visual performance, greatly improving the visual experience for players. All swords maintain unified styling, satisfying players who prefer consistent visuals. More 3D gears and items are currently in development. I will keep expanding the pack whenever possible to deliver a more immersive gaming experience.

**_More 3D packs, coming soon._**
![More 3D packs are coming soon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71aebf11fdf98b590911b72d4f81e3f3bf79ea49_0.webp)
